title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF BALABAC, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, INTO A REGULAR MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4682 / 53 OG No. 22, 8054 (November 30, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2022, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF BALABAC, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, INTO A REGULAR MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Municipal District of Balabac, Province of Palawan, is converted into a regular municipality of said province, to be known as the Municipality of Balabac.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
